tasks.title: Install Better Auth and core dependencies
tasks.description: Install `better-auth` (^1.4.0) and `bcryptjs` (^2.4.3) in apps/api. Install `better-auth` in apps/admin and apps/web for the React client. Install `@types/bcryptjs` as devDependency in apps/api. Verify all packages resolve correctly with pnpm. Do NOT install any Clerk-replacement UI packages - we are doing custom auth-ui rewrite.

tasks.title: Create @repo/email package with Resend + React Email
tasks.description: Create new package `packages/email` with: (1) package.json with dependencies on `resend` (^4.0.0), `@react-email/components` (^0.0.30), and peer dep on `react`. (2) src/client.ts - Resend client singleton initialized from `HOSPEDA_RESEND_API_KEY` env var. (3) src/send.ts - generic `sendEmail({to, subject, react})` function with error handling and logging. (4) src/templates/base-layout.tsx - shared email layout with Hospeda branding. (5) src/templates/verify-email.tsx - email verification template with verification URL. (6) src/templates/reset-password.tsx - password reset template with reset URL. (7) src/index.ts - exports. (8) tsconfig.json extending shared config. Register package in pnpm workspace. Write unit tests for send function with mocked Resend client.

tasks.title: Create Better Auth Drizzle schema (session, account, verification tables)
tasks.description: Create three new Drizzle schema files in packages/db/src/schemas/user/: (1) session.dbschema.ts - session table with id (text PK), userId (uuid FK to users ON DELETE CASCADE), token (text UNIQUE NOT NULL), expiresAt, ipAddress, userAgent, impersonatedBy (BA Admin), createdAt, updatedAt. (2) account.dbschema.ts - account table with id (text PK), userId (uuid FK to users ON DELETE CASCADE), accountId, providerId, accessToken, refreshToken, accessTokenExpiresAt, refreshTokenExpiresAt, scope, idToken, password, createdAt, updatedAt. (3) verification.dbschema.ts - verification table with id (text PK), identifier, value, expiresAt, createdAt, updatedAt. Add Drizzle relations for all three tables. Export from packages/db barrel files. Do NOT modify users table yet (that's T-005).

tasks.title: Create Better Auth core config file
tasks.description: Create apps/api/src/lib/auth.ts with the main Better Auth configuration: (1) Import and configure drizzleAdapter with provider 'pg' pointing to existing db instance. (2) Configure `generateId: () => crypto.randomUUID()` for UUID compatibility. (3) Configure email/password with bcrypt hashing (hash and verify functions using bcryptjs). (4) Configure social providers: Google (GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET) and Facebook (FACEBOOK_CLIENT_ID, FACEBOOK_CLIENT_SECRET). (5) Configure BA Admin plugin with defaultRole 'USER'. (6) Configure session with cookieCache enabled (maxAge: 5 * 60). (7) Configure trustedOrigins for admin and web app URLs. (8) Configure account linking (enabled, trustedProviders: ['google', 'facebook']). (9) Map user table schema to existing users table via schema option. (10) Configure email sending via @repo/email package for verification and password reset. (11) Add databaseHooks stub (billing integration added in T-015). (12) Export auth instance and type helpers. Write unit test verifying config loads without errors.

tasks.title: Modify users table schema for Better Auth compatibility
tasks.description: Modify packages/db/src/schemas/user/user.dbschema.ts: (1) ADD column `email` (text, not null) - BA required field. (2) ADD column `emailVerified` / `email_verified` (boolean, default false). (3) ADD column `image` (text, nullable) - for avatar URL. (4) ADD columns `banned` (boolean, default false), `banReason` (text, nullable), `banExpires` (timestamp, nullable) - BA Admin plugin. (5) RENAME `displayName` to `name` (or configure BA field mapping). (6) CHANGE `role` from RolePgEnum to text type (BA Admin uses string, store RoleEnum values as strings). (7) REMOVE `authProvider` column. (8) REMOVE `authProviderUserId` column. (9) REMOVE unique index on (authProvider, authProviderUserId). (10) Keep ALL custom fields (slug, firstName, lastName, contactInfo, profile, settings, etc.). (11) Keep ALL audit fields. (12) Update the Drizzle relations to include new session/account relations. Update any TypeScript types that reference removed fields. Update UserModel if it references removed columns.

tasks.title: Generate and apply database migration
tasks.description: Run `pnpm db:generate` to create Drizzle migration from schema changes (T-003 + T-005). Review generated SQL carefully: verify new tables created, users table altered correctly, old columns dropped, indexes updated. Run `pnpm db:fresh-dev` to apply migration on dev database. Verify: (1) session table exists with correct columns. (2) account table exists with correct columns. (3) verification table exists. (4) users table has new columns (email, emailVerified, image, banned, banReason, banExpires). (5) users table no longer has authProvider, authProviderUserId. (6) user_auth_identities table is dropped (or mark for later removal if other code still references it). (7) All existing billing tables are unaffected. (8) All FKs from accommodations, sponsorships, etc. to users.id still work.

tasks.title: Rewrite API auth middleware for Better Auth
tasks.description: Rewrite apps/api/src/middlewares/auth.ts: (1) Remove all imports from `@hono/clerk-auth` and `@clerk/backend`. (2) Import auth instance from `../lib/auth`. (3) Create new `authMiddleware()` that calls `auth.api.getSession({ headers: c.req.raw.headers })` and sets session/user on Hono context. (4) Create `requireAuth()` middleware that checks if session exists, returns 401 if not. (5) Remove `isValidJwtFormat()` helper (no longer needed). (6) Remove Clerk-specific env var checks (DISABLE_CLERK_AUTH, etc.). (7) Export both middlewares. Write unit tests: (a) authenticated request returns session, (b) unauthenticated request returns null, (c) requireAuth blocks unauthenticated, (d) requireAuth passes authenticated.

tasks.title: Update actor middleware to use Better Auth session
tasks.description: Modify apps/api/src/middlewares/actor.ts: (1) Remove import of `getAuth` from `@hono/clerk-auth`. (2) Instead of `getAuth(c)`, get session from context set by authMiddleware (e.g., `c.get('session')`). (3) Instead of `userCache.getUser(auth.userId)` which looked up by clerkId, use `session.user` directly since BA session already contains the full user object with id, role, email. (4) Build Actor from `session.user.id`, `session.user.role`, and resolve permissions from role. (5) Keep entitlements injection from `c.get('userEntitlements')` unchanged. (6) Keep `createGuestActor()` fallback for unauthenticated requests. (7) Keep mock actor support for tests. Write unit tests: (a) authenticated creates actor with correct id/role, (b) SUPER_ADMIN gets all permissions, (c) unauthenticated returns guest actor, (d) entitlements are included when available.

tasks.title: Simplify or remove UserCache
tasks.description: Evaluate and simplify apps/api/src/utils/user-cache.ts: Since Better Auth sessions already contain user data (id, role, email, name), the UserCache that mapped clerkUserId to dbUser is no longer needed for its primary purpose. Options: (1) DELETE entirely if all user data comes from BA session. (2) SIMPLIFY to only cache extended user data (permissions, settings) that BA session doesn't include, keyed by user.id (uuid) instead of clerkUserId. Decision: If BA session + additionalFields provides role and all needed Actor fields, delete the cache. Otherwise simplify. Update all files that import from user-cache.ts. Remove LRU dependency if cache is deleted.

tasks.title: Create Better Auth handler route and remove Clerk routes
tasks.description: In apps/api: (1) Create src/routes/auth/handler.ts that mounts Better Auth on the Hono app: `app.on(['POST', 'GET'], '/api/auth/*', (c) => auth.handler(c.req.raw))`. Register this route in the main app router. (2) DELETE src/routes/auth/sync.ts (replaced by BA database hooks). (3) DELETE src/routes/auth/webhook.ts (no external webhooks). (4) DELETE or REWRITE src/routes/auth/signout.ts (BA handles /api/auth/sign-out). (5) DELETE or REWRITE src/routes/auth/status.ts to use BA get-session. (6) Update the auth route index/barrel file to reflect removed routes. (7) Verify CORS is configured to allow credentials from admin and web app origins. Write smoke test that BA handler responds on /api/auth/get-session.

tasks.title: Update env config and validation schemas
tasks.description: Update environment configuration across the monorepo: (1) In packages/config/src/env.ts: Remove HOSPEDA_CLERK_SECRET_KEY, HOSPEDA_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, HOSPEDA_CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET validations. Add BETTER_AUTH_SECRET (z.string().min(32)), BETTER_AUTH_URL (z.string().url()), HOSPEDA_RESEND_API_KEY (z.string().min(1)), GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, FACEBOOK_CLIENT_ID, FACEBOOK_CLIENT_SECRET (all z.string().min(1)). (2) In apps/api/src/utils/env.ts: Same changes for API-specific env. (3) In apps/admin: Remove VITE_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, add VITE_BETTER_AUTH_URL (pointing to API). (4) In apps/web: Remove PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, CLERK_SECRET_KEY. Add PUBLIC_BETTER_AUTH_URL. (5) Update .env.example files in all apps. (6) Remove DISABLE_CLERK_AUTH and API_VALIDATION_CLERK_AUTH_ENABLED flags.

tasks.title: Update UserService to remove auth provider methods
tasks.description: Modify packages/service-core/src/services/user/user.service.ts: (1) Remove or update `getByAuthProviderId()` method - this was used by UserCache to look up users by Clerk ID. Since BA manages users directly, this may no longer be needed. If other code still calls it, refactor to use `getById()` instead. (2) Remove or update `ensureFromAuthProvider()` method - BA handles user creation directly. If billing hooks need to call user service methods, keep relevant parts. (3) Remove any imports of AuthProviderEnum if no longer used. (4) Update the UserModel in packages/db if it has methods referencing authProvider/authProviderUserId columns. (5) Ensure all remaining service methods work with the new users table schema (no authProvider, no authProviderUserId). Run existing user service tests and fix any failures.

tasks.title: Create Better Auth React client for admin app
tasks.description: Create apps/admin/src/lib/auth-client.ts: (1) Import `createAuthClient` from 'better-auth/react'. (2) Configure with baseURL pointing to API (from VITE_BETTER_AUTH_URL env var). (3) Add admin plugin client: `import { adminClient } from 'better-auth/client/plugins'`. (4) Export `authClient` instance. (5) Export convenience hooks: `const { useSession, signIn, signUp, signOut } = authClient`. (6) Export type helpers for Session, User. Write a simple test verifying the client instantiates correctly.

tasks.title: Create Better Auth integration for Astro web app
tasks.description: Set up Better Auth in the Astro web app: (1) Create src/pages/api/auth/[...all].ts as catch-all API route that forwards to BA handler (import auth from API package or create separate BA instance that shares the same DB). Decision: Since Astro and API are separate apps, the web app should use the BA React client pointing to the API's /api/auth/* endpoints (not run its own BA instance). (2) Create src/lib/auth-client.ts with `createAuthClient({ baseURL: PUBLIC_BETTER_AUTH_URL })`. (3) Remove @clerk/astro from astro.config.mjs integrations. (4) Rewrite src/middleware.ts: Replace clerkMiddleware() with custom middleware that calls BA get-session to populate Astro.locals with user/session data. (5) Export auth client for use in React islands.

tasks.title: Implement Better Auth database hooks for billing integration
tasks.description: Add database hooks to the Better Auth config in apps/api/src/lib/auth.ts: (1) databaseHooks.user.create.after: Call billingCustomerSyncService.ensureCustomerExists({ userId: user.id, email: user.email, name: user.name }). If user.role === 'HOST', call trialService.startTrial({ customerId, userType: 'owner' }). Wrap in try-catch (non-blocking). Log errors. (2) databaseHooks.user.update.after: If email changed, sync to billing customer. (3) databaseHooks.user.delete.before: Handle billing customer cleanup if needed. (4) Update BillingCustomerSyncService metadata from source:'clerk' to source:'better-auth'. Write integration test: create user via BA → verify billing customer created → verify trial started for HOST role.

tasks.title: Rewrite admin root layout and auth provider
tasks.description: Modify apps/admin/src/routes/__root.tsx: (1) Remove import of ClerkProvider from '@clerk/tanstack-react-start'. (2) Remove the ClerkProvider wrapper. (3) BA React client doesn't need a provider component wrapping the tree (it uses fetch internally). If auth context is needed globally, create a minimal AuthProvider that uses authClient.useSession() and provides user/session via React context. (4) DELETE apps/admin/src/integrations/clerk/ directory entirely (provider.tsx, header-user.tsx). (5) Update header-user to use auth-ui UserMenu component (after T-025 completes, use placeholder for now). (6) Ensure the app renders without Clerk dependencies.

tasks.title: Rewrite admin route protection (_authed.tsx and auth.tsx)
tasks.description: Modify apps/admin/src/routes/_authed.tsx: (1) Remove import of getAuth from '@clerk/tanstack-react-start/server'. (2) In beforeLoad, replace Clerk auth check with BA session check. Use server function that calls auth.api.getSession({ headers: request.headers }). (3) If no session, redirect to /auth/signin with return URL. (4) If session exists, return user data to route context. Modify apps/admin/src/routes/auth.tsx: (1) Replace Clerk auth check with BA session check. (2) If session exists (already authenticated), redirect to dashboard. (3) If no session, allow access to auth pages. Modify apps/admin/src/routes/index.tsx similarly. Write tests for both protected and anti-auth redirects.

tasks.title: Rewrite admin signin and signup routes
tasks.description: Rewrite apps/admin/src/routes/auth/signin.tsx: (1) Remove Clerk SignIn component. (2) Import and render SignInForm from @repo/auth-ui (after T-023 completes). (3) Pass API base URL and redirect URL props. (4) Style consistently with existing admin layout. Rewrite apps/admin/src/routes/auth/signup.tsx: (1) Remove Clerk SignUp component. (2) Import and render SignUpForm from @repo/auth-ui (after T-024). (3) Pass props. DELETE apps/admin/src/routes/auth/callback.tsx (BA handles OAuth callbacks internally). DELETE apps/admin/src/hooks/use-auth-sync.ts (no sync needed). Rewrite apps/admin/src/contexts/auth-context.tsx to use authClient.useSession() instead of Clerk hooks.

tasks.title: Rewrite admin header user component
tasks.description: Create a new header user component to replace apps/admin/src/integrations/clerk/header-user.tsx (which used Clerk UserButton). Create apps/admin/src/components/header-user.tsx: (1) Use authClient.useSession() to get current user. (2) Display user avatar (from user.image), name, and role. (3) Dropdown menu with: Profile, Sign Out. (4) Sign out calls authClient.signOut() and redirects. (5) If admin/super_admin, show 'Admin' badge. (6) If impersonating, show impersonation indicator with 'Stop' button. Update wherever header-user was imported to point to new location.

tasks.title: Rewrite web app middleware and auth components
tasks.description: In apps/web: (1) Rewrite src/middleware.ts: Remove clerkMiddleware import. Create middleware that calls BA API to get session from request headers/cookies. Populate Astro.locals.user and Astro.locals.session. If no session, set both to null (don't block - web pages are mostly public). (2) DELETE src/components/auth/ClerkRoot.tsx. (3) Rewrite src/components/auth/AuthProvider.tsx: Remove ClerkProvider, provide BA auth client via React context for islands. (4) Rewrite src/components/auth/UserNav.tsx: Use BA auth client useSession() for user state, render sign-in/sign-up links or user menu. (5) Rewrite src/contexts/auth-context.tsx: Use BA session instead of Clerk hooks.

tasks.title: Rewrite web app signin/signup form wrappers
tasks.description: In apps/web: (1) Rewrite src/components/auth/SignInFormWrapper.tsx: Remove ClerkProvider wrapper. Import SignInForm from @repo/auth-ui. Pass API base URL. Wrap in AuthProvider with BA client. (2) Rewrite src/components/auth/SignUpFormWrapper.tsx: Same pattern with SignUpForm from @repo/auth-ui. (3) Ensure these components work as React islands in Astro pages (client:load or client:visible). (4) Test that OAuth buttons redirect correctly to API auth endpoints.

tasks.title: Remove Astro Clerk integration from config
tasks.description: In apps/web/astro.config.mjs: (1) Remove `import clerk from '@clerk/astro'` and the clerk() integration from the integrations array. (2) Remove any Clerk-specific Vite config or env defines. (3) Verify astro dev still starts correctly without the Clerk integration. This is a small but critical change that must happen for the app to work without Clerk.

tasks.title: Rewrite auth-ui SignInForm component
tasks.description: Rewrite packages/auth-ui/src/sign-in-form.tsx: (1) Remove all imports from @clerk/clerk-react (useSignIn, useAuth). (2) Accept props: { authClient, apiBaseUrl, redirectTo, onSuccess, refreshAuthContext }. (3) Implement email/password sign-in using authClient.signIn.email({ email, password }). (4) Implement Google OAuth button using authClient.signIn.social({ provider: 'google', callbackURL }). (5) Implement Facebook OAuth button using authClient.signIn.social({ provider: 'facebook', callbackURL }). (6) Maintain existing UI layout and styling (form fields, OAuth divider, error display). (7) Handle loading states, validation errors, and auth errors. (8) On success, call onSuccess callback and/or redirect. (9) Use useAuthTranslations() hook for i18n (keep existing). Write unit tests with mocked authClient.

tasks.title: Rewrite auth-ui SignUpForm component
tasks.description: Rewrite packages/auth-ui/src/sign-up-form.tsx: (1) Remove all imports from @clerk/clerk-react (useSignUp, useAuth). (2) Accept props: { authClient, apiBaseUrl, redirectTo, onSuccess }. (3) Implement email/password sign-up using authClient.signUp.email({ email, password, name }). (4) Implement Google/Facebook OAuth sign-up (same as sign-in - BA handles new user creation). (5) After successful sign-up, show email verification prompt (BA sends verification email automatically). (6) Handle validation: email format, password strength (min 8 chars), name required. (7) Handle error states: email already exists, network errors. (8) Use useAuthTranslations() for i18n. Write unit tests.

tasks.title: Rewrite auth-ui UserMenu component
tasks.description: Rewrite packages/auth-ui/src/user-menu.tsx: (1) Remove all imports from @clerk/clerk-react (useAuth, useUser). (2) Accept props: { session, onSignOut, dashboardUrl, profileUrl }. (3) Use session.user for avatar (image), name, email display. (4) Dropdown menu: Dashboard link, Profile link, Sign Out button. (5) Sign out calls provided onSignOut callback (which should call authClient.signOut()). (6) Fallback: if no session, render sign-in/sign-up buttons. (7) Maintain existing dropdown styling, avatar with initials fallback, backdrop click-to-close. Write unit tests.

tasks.title: Rewrite auth-ui SimpleUserMenu and SignOutButton
tasks.description: Rewrite packages/auth-ui/src/simple-user-menu.tsx: (1) Remove Clerk imports. (2) Accept session and callback props instead of using Clerk hooks. (3) Render sign-in/sign-up buttons if no session, user info + sign-out if session. Rewrite packages/auth-ui/src/sign-out-button.tsx: (1) Remove useAuth from @clerk/clerk-react. (2) Accept props: { onSignOut, redirectTo, className, children }. (3) On click, call onSignOut callback (which calls authClient.signOut()). (4) After sign-out, redirect to redirectTo or '/'. (5) Remove ClearSessionButton debug component (not needed with BA). Write unit tests for both.

tasks.title: Add password reset and email verification components to auth-ui
tasks.description: Create new components in packages/auth-ui/src/: (1) forgot-password-form.tsx: Form with email input. Calls authClient.forgetPassword({ email, redirectTo }). Shows success message ('Check your email'). (2) reset-password-form.tsx: Form with new password + confirm. Reads token from URL. Calls authClient.resetPassword({ newPassword, token }). Redirects to sign-in on success. (3) verify-email.tsx: Component that reads token from URL, calls authClient.verifyEmail({ token }). Shows success/error state. Auto-redirects on success. (4) Export all new components from index.ts. (5) Update package.json: Remove @clerk/clerk-react from peerDependencies. Add better-auth to peerDependencies. Write unit tests for all three components.

tasks.title: Update seed scripts for Better Auth
tasks.description: Modify packages/seed/src/utils/superAdminLoader.ts: (1) Remove the `updateClerkMetadata()` function entirely (no Clerk API calls). (2) Remove CLERK_SECRET_KEY env var usage. (3) Instead of creating user via userModel with authProvider/authProviderUserId, create user directly in the users table with BA-compatible fields: email, name, role='SUPER_ADMIN', emailVerified=true. (4) Create an `account` record with providerId='credential' and a bcrypt-hashed password for the super admin. (5) Remove hardcoded Clerk user ID ('user_31HTUXqo9ZFzgAfNCFhPlBVXbA1') from seed data JSON. (6) Update SEED_AUTH_PROVIDER env var handling - remove or replace with simpler approach. (7) Update super-admin-user.json to remove authProviderUserId field, add email field. (8) Test: run pnpm db:seed and verify super admin is created correctly.

tasks.title: Configure OAuth providers (Google, Facebook)
tasks.description: Configure OAuth credentials for Better Auth: (1) Document the exact callback URLs that need to be configured in Google Cloud Console: `{API_URL}/api/auth/callback/google`. (2) Document Facebook Developer Console callback URL: `{API_URL}/api/auth/callback/facebook`. (3) Add GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID, GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET, FACEBOOK_CLIENT_ID, FACEBOOK_CLIENT_SECRET to .env.example files. (4) Verify the socialProviders config in auth.ts matches the provider IDs ('google', 'facebook'). (5) Test OAuth flow end-to-end in dev: click Google → authorize → callback → session created. (6) Create a brief setup guide in docs or CLAUDE.md for future reference.

tasks.title: Create shared auth test utilities
tasks.description: Create test helper files for mocking Better Auth across the test suite: (1) apps/api/test/helpers/auth-mock.ts: Functions to create mock sessions, mock users, mock the auth middleware. Export `createMockSession(overrides)`, `createMockUser(overrides)`, `mockAuthMiddleware(session)`. (2) packages/auth-ui/test/setup.tsx: Replace Clerk mocks with BA client mocks. Mock `createAuthClient` to return controllable signIn/signUp/signOut/useSession methods. (3) apps/admin/test/setup.tsx: Same BA client mocks for admin tests. (4) apps/web/test/setup.tsx: Same for web tests. These utilities will be used by all subsequent test update tasks.

tasks.title: Update all API test files to use BA mocks
tasks.description: Systematically update all API test files that mock Clerk: Find all files with `vi.mock('@hono/clerk-auth')` or `vi.mock('@clerk/backend')` and replace with Better Auth mocks from T-030. Affected files include (but not limited to): (1) apps/api/test/middlewares/auth.test.ts (2) apps/api/test/middlewares/actor.test.ts (3) apps/api/test/integration/*.test.ts (~12 files) (4) apps/api/test/cron/cron-routes.test.ts (5) apps/api/test/routes/billing-trial-admin.test.ts (6) Any e2e test files. For each file: replace Clerk mock with `mockAuthMiddleware(createMockSession())`. Update assertions that check for Clerk-specific behavior. Run each test file after updating to verify it passes.

tasks.title: Update auth-ui and frontend test files
tasks.description: Update test files in packages/auth-ui, apps/admin, and apps/web: (1) packages/auth-ui/test/setup.tsx: Remove all vi.mock('@clerk/clerk-react') mocks. Add BA client mocks. (2) Any auth-ui component tests: Update to test with BA client props instead of Clerk hooks. (3) apps/admin test files: Replace Clerk mocks with BA session mocks. (4) apps/web test files: Same treatment. Run all test suites to verify passing.

tasks.title: Write integration tests for full auth + billing flow
tasks.description: Write comprehensive integration tests in apps/api/test/integration/auth-billing-flow.test.ts: (1) Test: Sign up with email/password → verify user created in DB → verify billing customer created → verify no trial (role=USER). (2) Test: Sign up as HOST (via admin role assignment) → verify trial started on 'owner-basico' plan → verify entitlements available. (3) Test: Sign in → verify session created → verify subsequent request has valid actor with correct role/permissions. (4) Test: Sign out → verify session deleted → verify subsequent request returns guest actor. (5) Test: OAuth sign in (mock Google callback) → verify account record created → verify user linked. (6) Test: Ban user → verify sign-in blocked. (7) Test: Email verification flow (mock). These tests validate the critical integration point between auth and billing that was previously handled by /auth/sync.

tasks.title: Run full test suite and verify coverage >= 90%
tasks.description: Run the complete test suite across all packages and apps: (1) pnpm test - verify all tests pass. (2) pnpm test:coverage - verify coverage >= 90% for modified packages. (3) Fix any failing tests discovered during the full run. (4) If coverage drops below 90% in any package, add targeted tests. (5) Document any tests that were intentionally removed (e.g., Clerk-specific integration tests that no longer apply). (6) Run pnpm typecheck to verify zero type errors. (7) Run pnpm lint to verify zero lint errors.

tasks.title: Remove all Clerk package dependencies
tasks.description: Remove Clerk packages from all package.json files: (1) apps/api/package.json: Remove @clerk/backend, @hono/clerk-auth, svix. (2) apps/admin/package.json: Remove @clerk/clerk-react, @clerk/tanstack-react-start. (3) apps/web/package.json: Remove @clerk/astro, @clerk/clerk-react. (4) packages/auth-ui/package.json: Remove @clerk/clerk-react from peerDependencies and devDependencies. (5) Run pnpm install to clean lockfile. (6) Run pnpm typecheck to verify no dangling Clerk imports. (7) Run pnpm build to verify all packages build successfully. (8) Verify no @clerk/* packages remain in pnpm-lock.yaml.

tasks.title: Clean up AuthProviderEnum and deprecated code
tasks.description: Final code cleanup: (1) Update packages/schemas/src/enums/auth-provider.enum.ts: Remove AuthProviderEnum entirely (no longer needed - BA manages providers via account table). Or if other code references it, remove CLERK value and keep as needed. (2) Drop user_auth_identities table if not done in T-006 (verify no remaining references). (3) Delete any remaining Clerk-specific files missed in earlier tasks. (4) Search codebase for any remaining 'clerk' or 'Clerk' references in code (not docs) and remove. (5) Remove DISABLE_CLERK_AUTH, API_VALIDATION_CLERK_AUTH_ENABLED from any remaining configs. (6) Clean up apps/admin/vite.config.ts Clerk-specific defines.

tasks.title: Update documentation
tasks.description: Update all documentation to reflect the auth migration: (1) CLAUDE.md (root): Update 'Authentication: Clerk' to 'Authentication: Better Auth'. Update env var section. (2) apps/admin/CLAUDE.md: Update auth section, remove Clerk references. (3) apps/api/CLAUDE.md: Update auth middleware documentation, remove webhook/sync references. (4) apps/web/CLAUDE.md: Update auth integration section. (5) packages/auth-ui/CLAUDE.md or README: Update to describe BA-based components. (6) packages/i18n/CLAUDE.md: No change (i18n is auth-independent). (7) Update any AUTH_IMPLEMENTATION.md files. (8) Update .env.example files with new BA vars and remove Clerk vars. (9) Update CI/CD secrets documentation (if .github/SECRETS.md exists).

tasks.title: Final validation: typecheck, lint, test, build
tasks.description: Final quality gate for the entire migration: (1) pnpm typecheck - zero errors across all packages. (2) pnpm lint - zero errors. (3) pnpm test - all tests pass. (4) pnpm test:coverage - coverage >= 90%. (5) pnpm build - all packages build successfully. (6) Manual smoke test: start dev servers (pnpm dev), sign up with email, sign in, verify session, sign out. (7) Verify billing flow: sign up → check billing customer created. (8) Search for any remaining @clerk imports: grep -r '@clerk' --include='*.ts' --include='*.tsx'. (9) If all pass, the migration is complete.
